center.name: 外貝加爾
center.summary: 外貝加爾是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括阿穆爾隼、田鸫，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in northern Norway, northern Sweden, Finland, Belgium, Germany, Switzerland, Austria, the Czech Republic, Slovakia, Hungary, Poland and Siberia as far east as Transbaikal, the Aldan River and the Tian Shan Mountains in North West China

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Amur falcon breeds in east Asia from the Transbaikalia, Amurland, and northern Mongolian region to parts of North Korea
